items.title: Ex-Ultrahuman hardware exec raises $5.5M for physical devices that control AI agents
items.note: Aina's Dune, Radiance and Shift give agents an off-screen way to launch and steer tasks

items.title: Missouri signs a new wholesaler-disclosure law, joining the state crackdown on assignment deals
items.note: SB 973 requires a 14-day written disclosure before contract and lets sellers cancel if it's skipped, effective Aug 28

items.title: Short sales now sell closer to market value than foreclosures, for the first time since 2018
items.note: Realtor.com: short sales up 16% YoY in Q1 as underwater owners increasingly dodge the foreclosure discount

items.title: Israeli data unicorn Redis cuts a quarter of its Tel Aviv R&D staff
items.note: About 80 jobs cut despite a $300M+ revenue run rate; company says no plans to close the site
